summary: MRP Quick Filter and Open PO/Scheduled Receipts features testing completed. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Quick Filter section with Category and Vendor dropdowns working correctly, Clear button appears when filter active, 'Showing X items' badge displays filtered count, week accordion item counts update with filters. New table columns (Safety, Stock, Open PO, Net, Order Qty) all visible and displaying correct data.
critical_code_review_comments: Quick Filter state variables (categoryFilter, vendorFilter) correctly initialized at lines 132-135
getFilteredWeeklyPlan function (lines 143-163) correctly filters items by category and vendor
Quick Filter UI (lines 1590-1640) properly renders Category and Vendor dropdowns with Clear button
New table columns (Safety, Stock, Open PO, Net, Order Qty) correctly added at lines 1747-1751
Open PO column styled with purple color (text-purple-600) as specified
Backend _get_scheduled_receipts method (lines 1049-1130) correctly queries purchase_order_lines collection
Net calculation in _calculate_order_timing (lines 615-623) uses formula: Net = Gross + Safety - Stock - Scheduled_Receipts
seed_data_creation: Used existing weekly MRP run MRP-20260328-165305 with 52 weeks, 1302 Common RMs
context_for_next_testing_agent: MRP Quick Filter and Open PO features fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Quick Filter section appears below main filters with Category and Vendor dropdowns. 2) Category dropdown shows 5 categories: ACC, ELC, INM, INP, SPR. 3) Selecting a category filters weekly plan items correctly (e.g., ELC shows 1081 items, 23 per week). 4) Clear button appears when filter active and resets filters. 5) 'Showing X items' badge displays correct filtered count. 6) Week accordion item counts update when filters applied. 7) New table columns visible: Safety, Stock, Open PO (purple), Net, Order Qty. 8) Backend _get_scheduled_receipts queries purchase_order_lines collection with open statuses (DRAFT, ISSUED, ACKNOWLEDGED, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, PARTIAL_RECEIVED). 9) Net calculation: Net = Gross + Safety - Stock - Scheduled_Receipts.

open_po_integration.note: Current POs have status=DRAFT which is included in open statuses. scheduled_receipts shows 0 for most items because PO lines don't have matching rm_ids in the weekly plan or expected_delivery_date is not set.
